name: prototype-animation
description: Standalone HTML animation prototype: a replayable completion micro-interaction with an easing-curve switcher and the copy-paste CSS that drives it. Interactive template — carries the AG-0011 D2 minimal-JS exception: self-contained inline JS replays the animation and swaps the easing curve, with no external resources.

slots.description: Prototype title; used in <title> and the h1.
The animated demo element region; the prototype markup whose transitions are being shown.
One .ease-btn per easing option; the demo swaps --ease to the button's data-ease. See shape.
Copy-paste CSS that reproduces the animation.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.easings[]: { name: string, curve: string (a CSS timing function, e.g. cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)) }
